recommendations.title: Lost Bullet 2
recommendations.overview: Having cleared his name, genius mechanic Lino has only one goal in mind: getting revenge on the corrupt cops who killed his brother and his mentor.

recommendations.title: Magnum Force
recommendations.overview: "Dirty" Harry Callahan is a San Francisco Police Inspector on the trail of a group of rogue cops who have taken justice into their own hands. When shady characters are murdered one after another in grisly fashion, only Dirty Harry can stop them.

recommendations.title: The Breath
recommendations.overview: A small task force of the Turkish army have to defend a relay station in the middle of nowhere against a possible terrorist raid.

recommendations.title: Across 110th Street
recommendations.overview: In a daring robbery, some $300,000 is taken from the Italian mob. Several mafiosi are killed, as are two policemen. Lt. Pope and Capt. Mattelli are two New York City cops trying to break the case. Three small-time criminals are on the run with the mo

recommendations.title: The Guilty
recommendations.overview: Police officer Asger Holm, demoted to desk work as an alarm dispatcher, answers a call from a panicked woman who claims to have been kidnapped. Confined to the police station and with the phone as his only tool, Asger races against time to get help a

recommendations.title: I Can Quit Whenever I Want 2: Masterclass
recommendations.overview: Pietro Zinni is asked by the police to revive the old gang to create a task force that will stop the spread of smart drugs.

recommendations.title: Tokyo Revengers
recommendations.overview: An unemployed man learns that his ex-girlfriend was murdered. He suddenly finds himself travelling through time to his middle school years and has chance to change the future and save the girl. He aims to rise to the top of the most brutal delinquent

recommendations.title: Who Killed Captain Alex?
recommendations.overview: Recognized as Uganda’s first action film, Who Killed Captain Alex? is about the aftermath of a police raid in Kampala in which a police captain is killed.

recommendations.title: Badlapur
recommendations.overview: After his wife and son are killed, a young man finds out the man behind the murder and fights against him, along committing some big mistakes.

recommendations.title: The Shadow's Edge
recommendations.overview: Macau Police brings the tracking expert police officer out of retirement to help catch a dangerous group of professional thieves.
